description: Contains all patent and non-patent literature citations made in patent publications, indicating prior art and technological relationships.

columns.name: citn_id
columns.description: Sequential identifier for citations within a patent publication.

columns.name: pat_publn_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the citing patent publication.

columns.name: cited_pat_publn_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the cited patent publication (null if citing non-patent literature).

columns.name: cited_appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the cited patent application (null if citing non-patent literature).

columns.name: npl_citn_seq_nr
columns.description: Sequential number for non-patent literature citations within the publication.

columns.name: citn_gener_auth
columns.description: Patent authority that generated or provided the citation.

columns.name: citn_replenished
columns.description: Flag indicating if citation data was enhanced from additional sources beyond the original publication.

columns.name: citn_origin
columns.description: Origin of the citation (e.g., examiner-added, applicant-provided, search report).

columns.name: pat_citn_seq_nr
columns.description: Sequential number for patent citations within the publication.

columns.name: cited_npl_publn_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the cited non-patent literature (null if citing a patent).
